ss_final_code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Bouncing Ball with Trail</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background-color: #1a1a2e;
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100vw;
            height: 100vh;
        }
        
        canvas {
            display: block;
            background-color: #1a1a2e;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
    
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Set canvas size to viewport
        canvas.width = 1920;
        canvas.height = 1080;
        
        // Ball properties
        const ball = {
            x: canvas.width / 2,
            y: 50,
            radius: 15,
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0,
            gravity: 0.5, // Scaled gravity for smooth animation
            bounce: 0.7, // Coefficient of restitution
            friction: 0.99 // Air resistance
        };
        
        // Trail system
        const trail = [];
        const maxTrailLength = 25;
        
        // Create radial gradient for ball
        function createBallGradient(x, y, radius) {
            const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(x - radius/3, y - radius/3, 0, x, y, radius);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#ff6b6b');
            gradient.addColorStop(0.7, '#ee5a52');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#c44569');
            return gradient;
        }
        
        // Add position to trail
        function addToTrail() {
            trail.push({
                x: ball.x,
                y: ball.y,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            });
            
            // Remove old trail points
            if (trail.length > maxTrailLength) {
                trail.shift();
            }
        }
        
        // Update ball physics
        function updateBall() {
            // Apply gravity
            ball.vy += ball.gravity;
            
            // Apply air resistance
            ball.vx *= ball.friction;
            ball.vy *= ball.friction;
            
            // Update position
            ball.x += ball.vx;
            ball.y += ball.vy;
            
            // Boundary collisions
            
            // Bottom boundary
            if (ball.y + ball.radius > canvas.height) {
                ball.y = canvas.height - ball.radius;
                ball.vy = -ball.vy * ball.bounce;
                
                // Add some randomness to horizontal velocity on bounce
                ball.vx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
            }
            
            // Top boundary
            if (ball.y - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.y = ball.radius;
                ball.vy = -ball.vy * ball.bounce;
            }
            
            // Left boundary
            if (ball.x - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.x = ball.radius;
                ball.vx = -ball.vx * ball.bounce;
            }
            
            // Right boundary
            if (ball.x + ball.radius > canvas.width) {
                ball.x = canvas.width - ball.radius;
                ball.vx = -ball.vx * ball.bounce;
            }
            
            // Add current position to trail
            addToTrail();
        }
        
        // Draw trail
        function drawTrail() {
            const currentTime = Date.now();
            
            trail.forEach((point, index) => {
                const age = currentTime - point.timestamp;
                const maxAge = 500; // 500ms fade time
                
                if (age < maxAge) {
                    // Calculate opacity based on age and position in trail
                    const ageOpacity = 1 - (age / maxAge);
                    const positionOpacity = index / trail.length;
                    const opacity = Math.min(ageOpacity, positionOpacity) * 0.5;
                    
                    if (opacity > 0) {
                        ctx.save();
                        ctx.globalAlpha = opacity;
                        
                        // Create gradient for trail point
                        const gradient = createBallGradient(point.x, point.y, ball.radius * 0.8);
                        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                        
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(point.x, point.y, ball.radius * 0.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();
                        
                        ctx.restore();
                    }
                }
            });
            
            // Clean up old trail points
            for (let i = trail.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (currentTime - trail[i].timestamp > 500) {
                    trail.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Draw ball
        function drawBall() {
            ctx.save();
            
            // Main ball
            ctx.fillStyle = createBallGradient(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Highlight
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x - ball.radius/3, ball.y - ball.radius/3, ball.radius/3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            ctx.restore();
        }
        
        // Main animation loop
        function animate() {
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // Update and draw
            updateBall();
            drawTrail();
            drawBall();
            
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
        
        // Initialize ball with slight horizontal velocity for more interesting movement
        ball.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
        
        // Start animation
        animate();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
rv_final_code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Bouncing Ball with Trail</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background-color: #1a1a2e;
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100vw;
            height: 100vh;
        }
        
        canvas {
            display: block;
            background-color: #1a1a2e;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
    
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Set canvas size to viewport
        canvas.width = 1920;
        canvas.height = 1080;
        
        // Ball properties
        const ball = {
            x: canvas.width / 2,
            y: 50,
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0,
            radius: 15,
            color: '#ff6b6b',
            gravity: 0.5, // Scaled gravity for 60fps (9.8 * 60^2 / 1000 ≈ 0.5)
            damping: 0.7, // Coefficient of restitution
            friction: 0.99 // Air resistance
        };
        
        // Trail system
        const trail = [];
        const maxTrailLength = 20;
        const trailFadeDuration = 500; // ms
        
        let lastTime = 0;
        
        function createTrailPoint(x, y) {
            return {
                x: x,
                y: y,
                timestamp: Date.now(),
                opacity: 0.5
            };
        }
        
        function updateTrail() {
            const currentTime = Date.now();
            
            // Add new trail point
            trail.push(createTrailPoint(ball.x, ball.y));
            
            // Remove old trail points and update opacity
            for (let i = trail.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const point = trail[i];
                const age = currentTime - point.timestamp;
                
                if (age > trailFadeDuration || trail.length > maxTrailLength) {
                    trail.splice(i, 1);
                } else {
                    // Update opacity based on age
                    point.opacity = 0.5 * (1 - age / trailFadeDuration);
                }
            }
        }
        
        function drawTrail() {
            for (let i = 0; i < trail.length; i++) {
                const point = trail[i];
                
                // Create radial gradient for trail point
                const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                    point.x, point.y, 0,
                    point.x, point.y, ball.radius
                );
                gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255, 107, 107, ${point.opacity})`);
                gradient.addColorStop(0.7, `rgba(255, 107, 107, ${point.opacity * 0.5})`);
                gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(255, 107, 107, 0)`);
                
                ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(point.x, point.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }
        
        function drawBall() {
            // Create radial gradient for the ball
            const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                ball.x - ball.radius * 0.3, ball.y - ball.radius * 0.3, 0,
                ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius
            );
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#ff9999');
            gradient.addColorStop(0.7, '#ff6b6b');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#cc5555');
            
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add a subtle highlight
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x - ball.radius * 0.4, ball.y - ball.radius * 0.4, ball.radius * 0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function updateBall(deltaTime) {
            // Apply gravity
            ball.vy += ball.gravity * deltaTime;
            
            // Apply air resistance
            ball.vx *= ball.friction;
            ball.vy *= ball.friction;
            
            // Update position
            ball.x += ball.vx * deltaTime;
            ball.y += ball.vy * deltaTime;
            
            // Boundary collisions
            
            // Bottom boundary
            if (ball.y + ball.radius > canvas.height) {
                ball.y = canvas.height - ball.radius;
                ball.vy = -ball.vy * ball.damping;
                
                // Add some randomness to prevent perfect vertical bouncing
                ball.vx += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
            }
            
            // Top boundary
            if (ball.y - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.y = ball.radius;
                ball.vy = -ball.vy * ball.damping;
            }
            
            // Left boundary
            if (ball.x - ball.radius < 0) {
                ball.x = ball.radius;
                ball.vx = -ball.vx * ball.damping;
            }
            
            // Right boundary
            if (ball.x + ball.radius > canvas.width) {
                ball.x = canvas.width - ball.radius;
                ball.vx = -ball.vx * ball.damping;
            }
        }
        
        function animate(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = Math.min((currentTime - lastTime) / 16.67, 2); // Cap delta time for stability
            lastTime = currentTime;
            
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // Update physics
            updateBall(deltaTime);
            
            // Update trail
            updateTrail();
            
            // Draw trail first (behind the ball)
            drawTrail();
            
            // Draw ball
            drawBall();
            
            // Continue animation
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
        
        // Start animation
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        
        // Add some initial horizontal velocity for more interesting movement
        ball.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
    </script>
</body>
</html>

About Us

We are a dynamic company dedicated to delivering exceptional solutions that exceed our clients' expectations. Our team combines years of experience with innovative approaches to tackle complex challenges.

Founded in 2015, we have grown from a small startup to a trusted partner for businesses worldwide. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction drives everything we do.

We believe in building long-term relationships with our clients through transparency, reliability, and continuous improvement in our services and processes.

Services

Our comprehensive service portfolio includes web development, mobile app creation, and digital marketing solutions tailored to your business needs.

We specialize in modern technologies including React, Node.js, Python, and cloud infrastructure to build scalable and robust applications.

From initial consultation to post-launch support, we provide end-to-end solutions that help your business thrive in the digital landscape.

Our agile development process ensures rapid delivery without compromising on quality or attention to detail.

Portfolio

Our portfolio showcases a diverse range of successful projects across various industries including e-commerce, healthcare, finance, and education.

We have delivered over 200 projects, ranging from simple landing pages to complex enterprise applications serving millions of users daily.

Each project in our portfolio demonstrates our commitment to clean code, intuitive design, and exceptional user experience.

Notable achievements include award-winning mobile apps and websites that have significantly improved our clients' business metrics.

Team

Our talented team consists of experienced developers, creative designers, and strategic thinkers who are passionate about technology and innovation.

With expertise spanning multiple programming languages and frameworks, our team stays current with the latest industry trends and best practices.

We foster a collaborative environment where creativity flourishes and every team member contributes to our collective success.

Contact

Ready to start your next project? We'd love to hear from you! Reach out to discuss your ideas and discover how we can bring them to life.

Email us at hello@company.com or call us at (555) 123-4567. We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.

Visit our office at 123 Innovation Drive, Tech City, TC 12345, or schedule a virtual consultation at your convenience.

Follow us on social media for the latest updates, industry insights, and behind-the-scenes glimpses of our work.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Solar System Animation</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #000;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        }
        
        canvas {
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #001122 0%, #000000 100%);
            border: 1px solid #333;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="solarSystem" width="1920" height="1080"></canvas>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('solarSystem');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Center of the solar system
        const centerX = canvas.width / 2;
        const centerY = canvas.height / 2;
        
        // Sun properties
        const sun = {
            x: centerX,
            y: centerY,
            radius: 40,
            color: '#FDB813'
        };
        
        // Planet definitions
        const planets = [
            {
                name: 'Mercury',
                radius: 8,
                color: '#B0B0B0',
                orbitRadius: 80,
                period: 3000, // 3 seconds in milliseconds
                angle: 0,
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                moon: {
                    radius: 4,
                    color: '#FFFFFF',
                    orbitRadius: 20,
                    period: 1000, // 1 second
                    angle: 0,
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                }
            },
            {
                name: 'Earth',
                radius: 12,
                color: '#4A90D9',
                orbitRadius: 140,
                period: 5000, // 5 seconds
                angle: 0,
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                moon: {
                    radius: 4,
                    color: '#FFFFFF',
                    orbitRadius: 20,
                    period: 1000,
                    angle: 0,
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                }
            },
            {
                name: 'Mars',
                radius: 10,
                color: '#C1440E',
                orbitRadius: 200,
                period: 7000, // 7 seconds
                angle: 0,
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                moon: {
                    radius: 4,
                    color: '#FFFFFF',
                    orbitRadius: 20,
                    period: 1000,
                    angle: 0,
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                }
            },
            {
                name: 'Jupiter',
                radius: 18,
                color: '#C88B3A',
                orbitRadius: 280,
                period: 11000, // 11 seconds
                angle: 0,
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                moon: {
                    radius: 4,
                    color: '#FFFFFF',
                    orbitRadius: 20,
                    period: 1000,
                    angle: 0,
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0
                }
            }
        ];
        
        function drawOrbitPath(radius) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.setLineDash([3, 3]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
        }
        
        function drawSun() {
            // Create radial gradient for glow effect
            const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(sun.x, sun.y, 0, sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 2);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, sun.color);
            gradient.addColorStop(0.7, sun.color);
            gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(253, 184, 19, 0)');
            
            // Draw glow
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw sun core
            ctx.fillStyle = sun.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawShadow(x, y, radius) {
            // Calculate shadow offset (away from sun)
            const dx = x - sun.x;
            const dy = y - sun.y;
            const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
            const shadowOffset = 3;
            const shadowX = x + (dx / distance) * shadowOffset;
            const shadowY = y + (dy / distance) * shadowOffset;
            
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(shadowX, shadowY, radius * 0.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawPlanet(planet) {
            // Draw shadow first (behind planet)
            drawShadow(planet.x, planet.y, planet.radius);
            
            // Draw planet
            ctx.fillStyle = planet.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(planet.x, planet.y, planet.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add subtle highlight
            const highlight = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                planet.x - planet.radius * 0.3, 
                planet.y - planet.radius * 0.3, 
                0,
                planet.x, 
                planet.y, 
                planet.radius
            );
            highlight.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)');
            highlight.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');
            
            ctx.fillStyle = highlight;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(planet.x, planet.y, planet.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawMoon(moon) {
            // Draw moon shadow
            drawShadow(moon.x, moon.y, moon.radius);
            
            // Draw moon
            ctx.fillStyle = moon.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(moon.x, moon.y, moon.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function updatePositions(timestamp) {
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                // Update planet position
                planet.angle = (timestamp / planet.period) * Math.PI * 2;
                planet.x = centerX + Math.cos(planet.angle) * planet.orbitRadius;
                planet.y = centerY + Math.sin(planet.angle) * planet.orbitRadius;
                
                // Update moon position relative to planet
                planet.moon.angle = (timestamp / planet.moon.period) * Math.PI * 2;
                planet.moon.x = planet.x + Math.cos(planet.moon.angle) * planet.moon.orbitRadius;
                planet.moon.y = planet.y + Math.sin(planet.moon.angle) * planet.moon.orbitRadius;
            });
        }
        
        function animate(timestamp) {
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // Update positions
            updatePositions(timestamp);
            
            // Draw orbit paths
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                drawOrbitPath(planet.orbitRadius);
            });
            
            // Draw sun
            drawSun();
            
            // Draw planets and their moons
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                drawPlanet(planet);
                drawMoon(planet.moon);
            });
            
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
        
        // Start animation
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
rv_final_code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Solar System Animation</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #000;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        }
        
        canvas {
            background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #001122 0%, #000000 100%);
            border: 1px solid #333;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="solarSystem" width="1920" height="1080"></canvas>

    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('solarSystem');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Center of the solar system
        const centerX = canvas.width / 2;
        const centerY = canvas.height / 2;
        
        // Sun properties
        const sun = {
            x: centerX,
            y: centerY,
            radius: 40,
            color: '#FDB813'
        };
        
        // Planet definitions
        const planets = [
            {
                name: 'Mercury',
                radius: 8,
                color: '#B0B0B0',
                orbitRadius: 80,
                period: 3000, // 3 seconds in milliseconds
                angle: 0,
                moonAngle: 0
            },
            {
                name: 'Earth',
                radius: 12,
                color: '#4A90D9',
                orbitRadius: 140,
                period: 5000, // 5 seconds in milliseconds
                angle: 0,
                moonAngle: 0
            },
            {
                name: 'Mars',
                radius: 10,
                color: '#C1440E',
                orbitRadius: 200,
                period: 7000, // 7 seconds in milliseconds
                angle: 0,
                moonAngle: 0
            },
            {
                name: 'Jupiter',
                radius: 18,
                color: '#C88B3A',
                orbitRadius: 280,
                period: 11000, // 11 seconds in milliseconds
                angle: 0,
                moonAngle: 0
            }
        ];
        
        // Moon properties
        const moonRadius = 4;
        const moonOrbitRadius = 20;
        const moonPeriod = 1000; // 1 second in milliseconds
        
        let lastTime = 0;
        
        function drawOrbitPath(radius) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.setLineDash([3, 3]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(centerX, centerY, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
        }
        
        function drawSun() {
            // Create radial gradient for glow effect
            const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(sun.x, sun.y, 0, sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 2);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, sun.color);
            gradient.addColorStop(0.7, sun.color);
            gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(253, 184, 19, 0)');
            
            // Draw glow
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw sun core
            ctx.fillStyle = sun.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(sun.x, sun.y, sun.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawPlanet(planet, x, y) {
            // Draw shadow (offset towards sun)
            const shadowOffsetX = (centerX - x) * 0.1;
            const shadowOffsetY = (centerY - y) * 0.1;
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x + shadowOffsetX, y + shadowOffsetY, planet.radius * 0.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw planet
            ctx.fillStyle = planet.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, planet.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add subtle highlight
            const highlight = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                x - planet.radius * 0.3, 
                y - planet.radius * 0.3, 
                0, 
                x, 
                y, 
                planet.radius
            );
            highlight.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)');
            highlight.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');
            ctx.fillStyle = highlight;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, planet.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function drawMoon(planetX, planetY, moonAngle) {
            const moonX = planetX + Math.cos(moonAngle) * moonOrbitRadius;
            const moonY = planetY + Math.sin(moonAngle) * moonOrbitRadius;
            
            // Draw moon shadow
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(moonX + 1, moonY + 1, moonRadius * 0.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Draw moon
            ctx.fillStyle = '#FFFFFF';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(moonX, moonY, moonRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            
            // Add subtle highlight to moon
            const moonHighlight = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                moonX - moonRadius * 0.3, 
                moonY - moonRadius * 0.3, 
                0, 
                moonX, 
                moonY, 
                moonRadius
            );
            moonHighlight.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)');
            moonHighlight.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(200, 200, 200, 1)');
            ctx.fillStyle = moonHighlight;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(moonX, moonY, moonRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        
        function animate(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;
            
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // Draw orbit paths
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                drawOrbitPath(planet.orbitRadius);
            });
            
            // Draw sun
            drawSun();
            
            // Update and draw planets with their moons
            planets.forEach(planet => {
                // Update planet angle (counterclockwise)
                planet.angle -= (deltaTime / planet.period) * Math.PI * 2;
                
                // Update moon angle (counterclockwise relative to planet)
                planet.moonAngle -= (deltaTime / moonPeriod) * Math.PI * 2;
                
                // Calculate planet position
                const planetX = centerX + Math.cos(planet.angle) * planet.orbitRadius;
                const planetY = centerY + Math.sin(planet.angle) * planet.orbitRadius;
                
                // Draw planet
                drawPlanet(planet, planetX, planetY);
                
                // Draw moon orbiting the planet
                drawMoon(planetX, planetY, planet.moonAngle);
            });
            
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
        
        // Start animation
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
